  • ContactOption

Interface ContactOption

Represents a contact option.

interface ContactOption {
    about?: string;
    channels?: Channel[];
    configCategory?: "CONTACTOPTIES";
    createdAt?: string;
    groupDisplayLabel?: string;
    key: string;
    label: string;
    lastModifiedAt?: string;
    name: string;
    ouapi_id?: string;
    privacy?: ContactPrivacy;
    requestedBy?: string;
    social?: {
        description?: string;
        media?: {
            description?: string;
            icon: ContactOptionSocialPlatform;
            text?: string;
            url: string;
        }[];
    };
    subject?: string;
    [key: string]: unknown;
}

  • Record<string, unknown>
    • ContactOption

  • [key: string]: unknown
  • Defined in global-header-types/src/contact.ts:232
